category_sources: source_facts.description says msedit is a simple text editor with a clickable interface; GitHub repository topics include editor, terminal, and text-editor.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is msedit, but the official repository is microsoft/edit and package managers install the executable as edit; display name normalized to the upstream project name.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; README is the official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo lookup was intentionally not performed per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a text editor with clickable interface; official GitHub repository topics include editor, rust, terminal, and text-editor.
